title: Editorial Triage: Style Guide Date Fix
description: Based on article KB-302, prepare a correction plan to fix the date format inconsistency in the style guide. The plan must identify affected sections, propose updated date format examples, and outline validation steps before publication.

title: Review Terminology Updates for Consistency
description: Review the latest terminology amendments from the style council and update the glossary accordingly. Cross-reference with existing terms in KB-201.

title: Archive Deprecated SOP Articles
description: Archive knowledge-base articles that refer to the old SOP process. Flag for deletion after 30-day review period.
